subcodes.first_line: O exalted branch of the divine Lote-Tree, if thou couldst perceive with the eye of certitude what stirreth within this [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الفرع الرفیع من السدره الرحمانیه لوتعلم بعین الیقین ما یختلج فی هذا
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
